leadership.name: David Kim
leadership.shortBio: Visionary leader shaping digital brands worldwide.
leadership.fullBio: David is a visionary leader with over 15 years of experience in digital design and brand strategy. He has led teams at top agencies before founding Pixora to revolutionize how brands connect with audiences through immersive digital experiences. His work has been recognized by Awwwards, CSS Design Awards, and FWA.
leadership.quote: Design is not just what it looks like. Design is how it works.

leadership.name: Sarah Mitchell
leadership.shortBio: Strategic mind driving company growth and innovation.
leadership.fullBio: Sarah brings strategic expertise from her background in business development and tech innovation. She co-founded Pixora with a mission to build a company that values creativity, technology, and people above all else. Under her leadership, Pixora has grown 300% year-over-year.
leadership.hobbies: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.

team.name: Maleesha
team.shortBio: React, Vue.js, TypeScript expert building scalable web applications.
team.fullBio: Maleesha is a passionate frontend developer with 5 years of experience specializing in React, Vue.js, and TypeScript. She loves creating performant, accessible user interfaces and contributing to open-source projects. Her code has been featured in several tech publications and she regularly speaks at local meetups about modern JavaScript frameworks.
team.education: University of Colombo - BSc Computer Science
team.quote: Code is poetry written in logic.

team.name: Jason Chen
team.shortBio: Award-winning designer specializing in user-centered design systems.
team.fullBio: Jason is an award-winning UI/UX designer with a keen eye for detail and a passion for creating intuitive digital experiences. He specializes in design systems and has worked with Fortune 500 companies to create cohesive brand experiences across multiple platforms.
team.quote: Good design is obvious. Great design is transparent.

team.name: Sarah Williams
team.shortBio: Full-stack engineer focused on Node.js, Python, and cloud architecture.
team.fullBio: Sarah is a skilled backend developer with expertise in Node.js, Python, and cloud architecture. She builds robust APIs and microservices that power high-traffic applications serving millions of users daily. She's passionate about clean code and mentoring junior developers.
team.quote: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand.

team.name: Alex Rivera
team.shortBio: PMP-certified PM ensuring timely delivery within budget.
team.fullBio: Alex is a PMP-certified project manager with a track record of delivering complex projects on time and within budget. He excels at cross-functional team coordination and stakeholder communication, ensuring smooth project execution from kickoff to launch.
team.quote: A goal without a plan is just a wish.

team.name: Emma Thompson
team.shortBio: Growth marketing specialist driving ROI through data-driven campaigns.
team.fullBio: Emma is a results-driven digital marketer who leverages data analytics to optimize campaigns and maximize ROI. She has experience across SEO, PPC, social media, and content marketing strategies that have generated millions in revenue for clients.
team.quote: Data is the new oil, but marketing is the engine.

team.name: David Park
team.shortBio: Infrastructure expert managing CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployments.
team.fullBio: David is a DevOps engineer specializing in infrastructure automation, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployments. He ensures our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure. He's implemented zero-downtime deployments and reduced infrastructure costs by 40%.
team.quote: Automate everything, document nothing... wait, no.

team.name: Lisa Anderson
team.shortBio: Quality assurance specialist ensuring bug-free product launches.
team.fullBio: Lisa leads our QA efforts with meticulous attention to detail. She implements comprehensive testing strategies including automated testing, performance testing, and security audits. Her testing frameworks have caught critical bugs before they reached production, saving the company thousands.
team.quote: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.

team.name: Mike Johnson
team.shortBio: React Native and Flutter expert creating cross-platform experiences.
team.fullBio: Mike is a mobile development specialist proficient in both React Native and Flutter. He creates beautiful, performant cross-platform applications that users love. His apps have been featured on both App Store and Google Play multiple times.
team.quote: The best app is the one you didn't notice using.

team.name: Nina Patel
team.shortBio: Analytics expert turning data into actionable insights and strategies.
team.fullBio: Nina is a data scientist who transforms complex datasets into actionable business insights. She uses machine learning and statistical modeling to drive data-informed decision making. Her predictive models have improved customer retention by 25%.
team.quote: Without data, you're just another person with an opinion.
